# UK Residential Property Tribunal Decisions

> A searchable, open-data database of 17,262+ residential property tribunal decisions from England (First-tier Tribunal, Property Chamber) and Wales (Residential Property Tribunal Wales). Covers leasehold disputes, rents, park homes, housing conditions, enfranchisement, and related matters from 2001 to the present.

The site is a static, client-side search interface (vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, no framework) hosted on GitHub Pages. All data is precomputed into a single JSON file which the frontend fetches and queries in the browser. Decisions are sourced from GOV.UK (England) and residentialpropertytribunal.gov.wales, and are licensed under the Open Government Licence v3.0.

This site is not affiliated with or endorsed by GOV.UK, HMCTS, or the Welsh Government.

## Core data

- [decisions.json](https://tractorjuice.github.io/uk-tribunal-decisions/data/decisions.json): Complete dataset served to the frontend. Top-level keys are `stats` (precomputed aggregates — total counts, categories, sub-categories, regions, year distribution, category hierarchy, field coverage, legal act frequencies, date range) and `decisions` (array of decision records with `case_reference`, `property_address`, `region_code`, `category`, `sub_category`, `decision_date`, `url`, `data_source`, and — where available — `applicant`, `respondent`, `tribunal_members`, `presiding_judge`, `decision_outcome`, `financial_amounts`, `hearing_date`, `legal_acts_cited`, and `full_text`).
- [Source repository (GitHub)](https://github.com/tractorjuice/uk-tribunal-decisions): Scraping pipeline, extraction scripts, and raw data files. See `README.md` and `CLAUDE.md` for pipeline details.

## Pages

- [Home / search interface](https://tractorjuice.github.io/uk-tribunal-decisions/): Search by property address, case reference, or keyword; filter by category, sub-category, region, and year range; sort by date or address; paginated results at 50 per page.
- [Sitemap](https://tractorjuice.github.io/uk-tribunal-decisions/sitemap.xml)
- [robots.txt](https://tractorjuice.github.io/uk-tribunal-decisions/robots.txt)

## Coverage

- **Total decisions:** 17,262 (England 16,486, Wales 776)
- **Date range:** 2001-05-28 to 2026-03-30
- **Full-text coverage:** 99.8% England, 92.9% Wales
- **Extracted legal acts:** 96.3% England, 100% Wales

### Categories (decision counts)

- Leasehold Disputes (Management): 6,677
- Rents: 5,203
- Housing Act 2004 and Housing and Planning Act 2016: 2,621
- Leasehold Enfranchisement and Extension: 971
- Park Homes: 703
- Wales - Leasehold Valuation: 350
- Wales - Rent Assessment: 265
- Wales - Residential Property: 161
- Right To Buy: 93
- Tenant Fees Act: 85
- Electronic Communications Code: 48
- Building Safety Act: 45
- Tenant Associations: 35
- Leasehold Reform Ground Rent Act 2022: 5

### Regions (decision counts)

- LON (London): 7,633
- CHI (Chichester): 2,851
- MAN (Manchester): 1,974
- BIR (Birmingham): 1,789
- CAM (Cambridge): 1,614
- WAL (Wales): 776
- HAV (Havant): 527
- Other / national (NS, VG, TR, NT, NAT, GB, RC, Unknown): ~100

### Most-cited legal acts

- Landlord and Tenant Act 1985 (6,957)
- Tribunal Procedure Rules 2013 (6,579)
- Rent Act 1977 (3,131)
- Housing Act 1988 (3,000)
- Leasehold Reform Act 2002 (2,856)
- Housing Act 2004 (2,751)
- Commonhold and Leasehold Reform Act 2002 (2,718)
- Housing and Planning Act 2016 (1,773)
- Leasehold Reform, Housing and Urban Development Act 1993 (1,031)
- Landlord and Tenant Act 1987 (955)

## Upstream sources

- [GOV.UK residential property tribunal decisions](https://www.gov.uk/residential-property-tribunal-decisions): Primary source for England decisions, accessed via the public GOV.UK Search and Content APIs.
- [Residential Property Tribunal Wales](https://residentialpropertytribunal.gov.wales): Primary source for Wales decisions; HTML pages with linked PDFs.
- [Open Government Licence v3.0](https://www.nationalarchives.gov.uk/doc/open-government-licence/version/3/): Licence under which all underlying decision data is published.

## Optional

- [README.md](https://github.com/tractorjuice/uk-tribunal-decisions/blob/main/README.md): Repository overview, pipeline commands, and statistics table.
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/tractorjuice/uk-tribunal-decisions/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): Detailed architecture notes for the six-stage scrape/enrich/extract/build pipeline.
